arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins breaks silence with 'special' Aston Villa message after Arsenal bid
arts.sum: In an attempt to unsettle the club ahead of what was a crucial game for Unai Emery's side, Arsenal presented a bid for the England striker and Birmingham Live understands that Villa were left furious by the timing. Ollie Watkins has spoken for the first time since Aston Villa rejected a £60million transfer bid from Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran: Aston Villa ace warned he’ll DISAPPEAR in Saudi as Emery breaks silence
arts.sum: He added that losing the South American may bring the best out of Ollie Watkins, who was subject of a shock bid from Arsenal prior to the Champions League clash against Celtic – a game the Birmingham club won 4-2. Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran has been warned that he will simply “disappear” when he completes his move to the Saudi Pro League.

arts.ttl: 'Man Utd's Malacia eyed by Celtic' - gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United's Tyrell Malacia is linked with Celtic as Leuven reportedly have a bid accepted for St Johnstone striker Benjamin Kimpioka

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry has already delivered Ollie Watkins verdict amid Arsenal bid for Aston Villa star
arts.sum: Arsenal have been looking for a striker all month and, on Wednesday, they tried their luck with a bid for Aston Villa’s Ollie Watkins. The...

arts.ttl: Gabby Agbonlahor calls talkSPORT to slam Arsenal's attempt to sign Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa star Gabby Agbonlahor has been left fuming after Arsenal's £60million bid for Ollie Watkins became public knowledge before Unai Emery's side took on Celtic in the Champions League

arts.ttl: World media reacts to Celtic 'redemption' at Aston Villa as Champions League spectacle forces grovelling Rodgers apology
arts.sum: It was a classic Euro night at Villa Park as the Hoops returned north of the border with plenty of credit in the bank

arts.ttl: Celtic can 'make it difficult' for Bayern or Real
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers is confident his side can "make it difficult" for either Bayern Munich or Real Madrid in the Champions League play-off round, but admits it will be a "huge challenge".

arts.ttl: Adam Idah proved to Celtic dressing room he CAN be next Kyogo as wowed teammate salivates at Jota team up prospect
arts.sum: Celtic lost out in the end but Idah won over a few of his doubters with a double

arts.ttl: Celtic prove to Philippe Clement he doesn’t need a magic stick at Rangers after all but a miracle – Keith Jackson
arts.sum: The Rangers boss made the quip upon being unveiled at Ibrox and the words ring truer to this day than they did then

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Arsenal striker MADNESS, Duran BOMBSHELL, Rashford CHANCE
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Arsenal's desperate striker pursuit, Jhon Duran's blockbuster move and Marcus Rashford's final chance to leave Man Utd. Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Arsenal striker MADNESS, Duran BOMBSHELL, Rashford CHANCE
